progress_summary: Ninth bug-check run on this project. Diff is the demo-artifact expansion chunk 1: site/src/pages/demo.astro (TOC + scrollspy + wider modal layout) plus full-length expansion of concept-to-shipped artifacts (master-spec, stack-decision, sprint-ledger, pr-bundle, rollback-runbook) and legacy-revive artifacts (reconstructed-spec, feature-spec). Ran: vitest (108/108 passed), astro check (0 errors / 0 warnings on the diff), site build (25 pages, clean — demo page grew from ~340KB to ~493KB), anti-pattern grep on diff (clean), secret scan (clean). Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: Source-touching commit — ran the full applicable check suite (tests, build, type-check, anti-patterns, secrets).
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; relying on astro check and tsc-via-astro for type/lint signal.
npm audit skipped because the diff doesn't change package.json or lockfiles.
user_preferences: User asked for the work to be done in small chunks; this is chunk 1 of N. Followups land in subsequent commits on the same branch.

next_actions: Continue the demo-artifact expansion in subsequent chunks (legacy-revive audit-report + stamp; dashboard-rescue; stripe-ship; postgres-migration; security-hardening). Re-run bug-check before each commit.
If a future commit changes package.json or package-lock.json, run npm audit --audit-level=critical as part of bug-check.
If eslint config is added to the repo, wire it into bug-check's lint step.

notes: Adds dynamic TOC sidebar to artifact lightbox modal (triggered when artifact has >=6 headings); modal widens to min(95vw, 1180px) and TOC collapses to <details> on narrow viewports.
Greatly expands concept-to-shipped artifacts to genuinely match their stated scope (master-spec is now 23 sections matching the '18 pages' claim).
Greatly expands legacy-revive artifacts (reconstructed-spec is now 16 sections including all 28 models and a top-30 risk map; feature-spec is 13 sections).
astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings on the diff (9 hints unrelated to this diff).
site build: clean (25 pages); demo page grew from ~340KB to ~493KB as expected.
